title: oxalis rubens
intro: Oxalis rubens, also known as the wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Oxalidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anthelmintic and antiseptic properties. Oxalis rubens is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
